methods.method_name: Study Area and Sampling Sites Identification
methods.description: This method describes the identification and characterization of study areas and sampling sites for paddy soil chronosequences in Southern China. It involves selecting sites based on historical land use and soil development stages.

steps.description: Identify study areas in Cixi County, Zhejiang Province, and Jinxian County, Jiangxi Province, based on geographical coordinates and climate data.
steps.searchable_summary: select study areas based on geographical coordinates and climate data

steps.description: Determine the history of land reclamation and rice cultivation using local historical literature and farmer interviews.
steps.searchable_summary: gather historical land use data from literature and interviews

steps.description: Evaluate parent material homogeneity using soil attribute parameters.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze soil attribute parameters for parent material homogeneity

methods.description: This method outlines the process of selecting representative soil profiles for sampling and describing them according to genetic horizons and morphological properties.

steps.description: Select representative soil profiles for sampling based on soil landscape and geomorphological characteristics.
steps.searchable_summary: choose soil profiles for sampling based on landscape and geomorphology

steps.description: Collect soil samples when fields are drained after rice harvest.
Describe soil profiles according to genetic horizons following standard field description guidelines.
steps.searchable_summary: describe soil profiles using genetic horizons
